instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall prevent gear shifting during high transmission oil temperature.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall disable shift commands when Transmission_Oil_Temp exceeds Max_Temp.

expected_output: IF Transmission_Oil_Temp > Max_Temp THEN Shift_Command = Disabled
IF Transmission_Oil_Temp <= Max_Temp THEN Shift_Enable = TRUE
IF Transmission_Oil_Temp_Sensor_Fault = TRUE THEN Shift_Command = Disabled
IF Transmission_Oil_Temp > Max_Temp AND Shift_Request = TRUE THEN Reject_Shift_Request

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall inhibit gear shifting during actuator faults.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall disable shift commands when Shift_Actuator_Fault is detected.

expected_output: IF Shift_Actuator_Fault = TRUE THEN Shift_Command = Disabled
IF Shift_Actuator_Fault = FALSE THEN Shift_Enable = TRUE
IF Shift_Actuator_Fault = TRUE AND Shift_Request = TRUE THEN Reject_Shift_Request
